notes:
The following worked for me via Terminal (Ubuntu/Debian instructions): 
1. sudo apt install python3-pip python3-setuptools 2. sudo python3 -m pip install protontricks 3. protontricks 644930 -q --force vcrun2017 dotnet472. In-game, turning Texture Quality down to Medium eliminated some issues with low framerate. Played through the first act of the campaign with no issues besides the aforementioned low framerate. Check https://github.com/Matoking/protontricks for more information regarding Protontricks.

notes: Basically all the previous tips are correct about "protontricks 644930 -q --force vcrun2017 dotnet472 gdiplus" BUT at least on my machine nothing would work/happen upon starting the game as for the latest 2 entries here. The problem was the automatically installed mono.net package for the games Proton Wineprefix. You have to uninstall this one by calling "wine64 uninstall" with the wine inside wherever/steam/proton/bin with the correct WINEPREFIX for your game(path_to_steam/steamapps/compatdata/644930/pfx). In the opening window uninstall anything that contains "mono". Afterwards applying all the protontricks + installing SlimDX(including error at the end) results in a fine working game! I started with dotnet472 and then applied the other 2 one after another as well. I guess this won't happen if you have not installed mono-wine but I'm just happy it's working now. Hope this might help others that were as clueless as me.
title: They Are Billions

title: They Are Billions

notes:
Game starts out of the box because of the Wine Mono 4.9.0 update in Proton.
However, the "protontricks 644930 -q --force vcrun2017 dotnet472 gdiplus" is still required to run the game smoothly. Otherwise you'll have overlapping GUI text elements and cannot save a game (missing DateTimeUTC call in wine mono). 
If you see the logmessage "Mono doesn't appear to be installed" and protontricks was finished in a couple of seconds, the tricks didn't execute properly! You've to download the Wine Mono 4.9.0 msi package from "http://dl.winehq.org/wine/wine-mono/4.9.0/" and install it to the "protontricks 644930 uninstaller" first. Then execute "protontricks 644930 -q --force vcrun2017 dotnet472 gdiplus" - this will take a couple of minutes to to do so!
Afterwards the game runs fine.
title: They Are Billions

Out of the box the games has issues with some text overlapping and being unable to save.

However, playing the game longer (survival mode), it seems that the game crashes. Had around 3 crashes in cca. 3h played, but the game is still playable since you can reload from the last autosave.

notes: Using steam & proton 4.11-6, latest and a clean prefix (protontricks --gui -> wipe old prefix) do the following: "protontricks 644930 -q corefonts vcrun2017 d3dx11_42 d3dx11_43 dotnet472 gdiplus win7" For me, this fixed campaign crashing and the text overlays. Runs gold now.
